title: Pukka Pad, A5 Metallic Jotta Book 3-Pack for Home, School, and Office – 15 x 21cm – Wirebound Notebook with 8mm Lines and 80GSM Paper – Features Perforated Edges - 200 Pages, Green
features: Fashion Forward Metallics: The Metallic Line from Pukka Pad is the trendiest option for your school or office, available in different sizes and colours so there’s something for every style
Convenient Multipack: The Jotta Notebooks come in packs of three, making them perfect for multiple classes or different work projects
A5 Page Perforation: Each book features A5 sized pages that tear out easily along the perforated lines, great leaving important memos around the house or taking your grocery lists to the store

FSC Certified: These notebooks are FSC certified, ensuring that the products have been sourced from responsibly managed forests as outlined by the non-profit Forest Stewardship Council, dedicated to environmentally and socially conscious production standards

Product Details: The Pukka Pad A5 Jotta Book features metallic card back covers and 200, 8mm lined, high-quality 80GSM pages, to prevent ghosting and bleeding through the pages, keeping all your notes neat and clean
description: From the manufacturer Premium Quality No Bleed Paper These notebooks use superior quality, bright, 80 GSM paper, allowing you to use a variety of pens without bleeding, ghosting, or leaking through to the other side. A5 Page Perforation Each book features A5 sized pages that tear out easily along the perforated lines, great leaving important memos around the house or taking your grocery lists to the store Durable Twin Binding These sturdy, stylish, and versatile notebooks include durable twin binding and are fantastic for organizing work projects, course work, or event planning.
